summary: The diff implements most of the required features: backend grid logic in main.mo, timer-driven bot loop, open orders query method, and BotControlPanel updates with running/stopped status and dismissible error alerts. All four REQs appear to be addressed, though the backend is truncated making some AC verifications uncertain.

hallucinated_features.description: useOrderErrors hook and cancellation-based dismissible amber alerts section in BotControlPanel
hallucinated_features.reason: The BotControlPanel imports and uses useOrderErrors for cancel errors, producing a separate amber dismissible alert section for cancellations. The build request only asks for order placement errors to be surfaced as dismissible alerts; cancel-specific error alerts were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Grid capital requirements estimator displayed in BotControlPanel
hallucinated_features.reason: The BotControlPanel includes an estimateGridRequirements function and displays minimum ICP/USDT capital estimates. This was not requested in any requirement or acceptance criterion.
